message:
fix: add sync_all() before atomic renames for crash safety

Ensures data is flushed to disk before rename in EditTool, WriteTool,
HashlineEditTool, SessionStoreV2 checkpoints/manifest/index, and
auth migration writes. Prevents data loss on power failure or crash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
